text: Last class we learned the places in the city.
Now we talk about my job at the company.

I am a manager and I help the employees.
Hi Dienane! I am new here. I work in the Sales department.
Welcome, Bruno! I am a manager in the HR department.
Nice to meet you! What does a manager in HR do?
I help the employees and I talk with the coworkers every day.
Do you like your job at the company?
Yes, I do! I like my team, and the company pays a good salary.
I am a manager.
I like my job and my team.

Hello, let me tell you about my job. I work at a big company in Altamira. I am a manager in the HR department. HR means human resources. Every day, I talk with the employees and I help my coworkers. I answer their questions about work, time, and salary. I like my job because I help people. My company is a good place to work, and my team is great.

Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you about our team. Our company has many departments. I am the manager of the Sales department. We have ten employees and three coworkers from other cities. Every Monday, we talk about our work and our goals. The company pays a good salary, and the people here are friendly. I am happy to work with this team.

Dienane arrives at the office in the morning. She talks with her coworkers about the day. She helps the employees with their questions. She has a meeting with her manager. She finishes her work and goes home.
